allowed_baseline: Use only operator-owned accounts, objects, and sandbox data.
Prefer sandbox assets over production assets where H1 says to test sandbox deployment.

out_of_scope_controls: Production equivalents such as manage.<program-redacted>.com, api.<program-redacted>.com, pay.<program-redacted>.com, oauth.<program-redacted>.com, connect.<program-redacted>.com, and payer-details.<program-redacted>.com are out of scope for this lane.
Ineligible or out-of-scope H1 assets are intentionally omitted from config/scope.txt.
